_meta.description: Per-platform, per-scene-type characteristic failure modes. Built incrementally from BQI data. Initial entries seeded from community knowledge with confidence: assumed. Martin should review before using in production negative generation.
notes: Entries with confidence: assumed need validation through BQI testing
severity: high = visibly damages the image, medium = noticeable degradation, low = subtle
Only platforms with known, documented failure patterns are included
Empty platforms are intentionally omitted — they will be populated from Phase 11 harmony data

indoor_character.pattern: distorted facial features at close range

outdoor_dramatic.pattern: oversmoothed textures at high detail settings

abstract_stylised.pattern: unwanted text generation in abstract compositions

outdoor_dramatic.pattern: GPT-4 rewrite flattens specific visual details

abstract_stylised.pattern: rewriter grounds abstract concepts into realism

outdoor_dramatic.pattern: style taxonomy mismatch for photorealistic scenes

indoor_character.pattern: anime style bleeding into photorealistic requests

outdoor_dramatic.pattern: background detail collapse at high token counts
